station.description: Bike sharing stations with location and capacity information. Contains 70 stations across the San Francisco Bay Area.

city.description: City where the bike station is located. Type: TEXT. Values: 'San Jose', 'Mountain View', 'San Francisco', 'Redwood City', 'Palo Alto'.

dock_count.description: Number of docking slots available at the station. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '15', '19', '23'.

installation_date.description: Date when the station was installed. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY format). Examples: '8/5/2013', '8/16/2013', '8/25/2013'.

lat.description: Latitude coordinate of the station location. Type: TEXT (decimal degrees). Examples: '37.330165', '37.794139'.

long.description: Longitude coordinate of the station location. Type: TEXT (decimal degrees, negative for western hemisphere). Examples: '-121.885831', '-122.394434'.

name.description: Name of the bike station, typically a street intersection or landmark. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'San Salvador at 1st', 'Steuart at Market', 'Golden Gate at Polk'.

status.description: Real-time status snapshots of bike stations showing bike and dock availability at specific timestamps. Contains 500 records.

bikes_available.description: Number of bikes currently available at the station. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '5', '7'.

docks_available.description: Number of empty docks currently available at the station. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '4', '10', '14'.

station_name.description: Name of the station this status record refers to. References station.name. Type: TEXT.

time.description: Timestamp when this status was recorded. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format). Examples: '2015-06-02 14:09:02'.

trip.description: Individual bike trip records with start/end details, duration, and rider type. Contains 500 records.

bike_id.description: Unique identifier of the bike used for the trip. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '434', '206', '312'.

duration.description: Duration of the trip in seconds. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '222' (about 4 min), '1785' (about 30 min).

end_date.description: Date and time when the trip ended. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY H:MM format). Examples: '8/21/2015 17:16'.

end_station_name.description: Name of the station where the trip ended. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'San Francisco Caltrain 2 (330 Townsend)', 'Arena Green / SAP Center'.

start_date.description: Date and time when the trip started. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY H:MM format). Examples: '8/21/2015 17:12'.

start_station_name.description: Name of the station where the trip began. Type: TEXT. Examples: '2nd at South Park', 'Market at 10th'.

subscription_type.description: Type of rider subscription. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Subscriber' (annual member) or 'Customer' (short-term/casual user).

zip_code.description: ZIP code of the rider. Type: TEXT. Examples: '95014', '95113', '94403'.

weather.description: Daily weather observations for the Bay Area, including temperature, humidity, wind, and precipitation. Contains 500 records.

cloud_cover.description: Cloud cover level on a scale (0-8, where 0 is clear sky and 8 is fully overcast). Type: TEXT (numeric string).

date.description: Date of the weather observation. Type: TEXT (M/D/YYYY format). Examples: '9/11/2013', '9/5/2013'.

events.description: Notable weather events for the day. Type: TEXT. Values: '' (empty/none), 'Rain', 'Fog', 'Fog-Rain', 'rain'.

max_dew_point_f.description: Maximum dew point temperature in Fahrenheit. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

max_gust_speed_mph.description: Maximum wind gust speed in miles per hour. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '23', '25', '6'.

max_humidity.description: Maximum humidity percentage for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '78', '82', '72'.

max_sea_level_pressure_inches.description: Maximum sea level atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '30', '30.03', '30.26'.

max_temperature_f.description: Maximum temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '74', '75', '70'.

max_visibility_miles.description: Maximum visibility distance in miles. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Typically '10'.

max_wind_Speed_mph.description: Maximum sustained wind speed in miles per hour. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '18', '21', '5'.

mean_dew_point_f.description: Mean dew point temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

mean_humidity.description: Mean humidity percentage for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '68', '70', '52'.

mean_sea_level_pressure_inches.description: Mean sea level atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury. Type: TEXT (decimal string).

mean_temperature_f.description: Mean temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '68', '61', '52'.

mean_visibility_miles.description: Mean visibility distance in miles for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Typically '10'.

mean_wind_speed_mph.description: Mean wind speed in miles per hour for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '9', '8', '0', '2'.

min_dew_point_f.description: Minimum dew point temperature in Fahrenheit. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

min_humidity.description: Minimum humidity percentage for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string).

min_sea_level_pressure_inches.description: Minimum sea level atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury. Type: TEXT (decimal string).

min_temperature_f.description: Minimum temperature in Fahrenheit for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '62', '51', '44', '48'.

min_visibility_miles.description: Minimum visibility distance in miles for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '10', '9', '7'.

precipitation_inches.description: Total precipitation in inches for the day. Type: TEXT (numeric string). '0' for no precipitation. Examples: '0', '0.5'.

wind_dir_degrees.description: Wind direction in compass degrees (0-360, where 0/360=North, 90=East, 180=South, 270=West). Type: TEXT (numeric string).

zip_code.description: ZIP code of the weather observation location. Type: TEXT. Examples: '94107' (SF), '94063', '94301' (Palo Alto).
